name: antifragility_vector
activation_condition: Activate only after every named activation gap is closed by current owner-linked receipts and bounded eval evidence for one repeated stressor family, with producer, output, live-state, and consumer review in the same change.
activation_gaps: ATM10-Agent runtime stressor receipts are not registered in the aoa-stats live receipt source registry.
ATM10-Agent adaptation_delta_v1 remains schema-and-example only and has no runtime publisher.
aoa-evals aoa-antifragility-posture remains draft and has no executed report chain over the current ATM10-Agent runtime receipts.
No repeated owner/eval window demonstrates movement for the same ATM10-Agent stressor family.
authority_ceiling: Even after activation this surface stays weaker than owner-local stressor receipts and bounded eval reports.
